next.components.auth.Consent.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
next.components.auth.Consent.heading: Authorize {appName}
next.components.auth.Consent.intro: {appName} would like to access your OpenAgenda account. It will be able to:
next.components.auth.Consent.scope.event: Access events across all your agendas
next.components.auth.Consent.scope.offli: Stay connected when you are away (refresh access)
next.components.auth.LostPassword.generi: An error occurred. Please try again.
next.components.auth.LostPassword.intro: You have an OpenAgenda account but no longer have the associated password. Enter your email to receive a reset link in your inbox.
next.components.auth.LostPassword.succes: The reset link has been sent to the email you entered. Delivery may take a few minutes — check your inbox and your spam folder. If you don't receive the link, contact our support team.
next.components.auth.MagicLink.genericEr: An error occurred. Please try again.
next.components.auth.MagicLink.intro: Enter your email to receive a sign-in link. No password needed. The link is valid for 10 minutes.
next.components.auth.MagicLink.successMe: If an account exists for this email, a sign-in link has been sent. Delivery may take a few minutes. Check your inbox and your spam folder. If you don't receive it, you can request another in a minute.
next.components.auth.PasswordField.isSam: Must be different from name or email 🙄
next.components.auth.ResetPassword.gener: An error occurred. Please try again.
next.components.auth.ResetPassword.intro: Choose a new password for your OpenAgenda account.
next.components.auth.ResetPassword.inval: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
next.components.auth.ResetPassword.passw: The two passwords do not match.
next.components.auth.ResetPassword.succe: You can now sign in with your new password.
next.components.auth.Signin.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
next.components.auth.Signin.invalidCrede: The email or the password are incorrect.
next.components.auth.Signin.linkProvider: Linking failed. Please sign in with Google again.
An OpenAgenda account already exists with this email. Confirm your password to link your Google account.
next.components.auth.Signup.agree: By creating an account you agree to the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and to the <policy>Privacy Policy</policy>.
next.components.auth.Signup.errors.captc: The captcha has expired. Please complete it again.
Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
next.components.auth.Signup.errors.email: This email is already in use
next.components.auth.Signup.errors.fullN: The username must not exceed 50 characters
next.components.auth.Signup.errors.passw: Password must be different from your name or email
next.components.auth.Signup.fullNameHelp: Your username will be visible to administrators of the calendars you contribute to.
next.components.auth.Signup.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
next.components.auth.Signup.signupSucces: Account created. Check your inbox to verify your email address.
next.components.auth.SignupComplete.cool: You can resend in {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}.
next.components.auth.SignupComplete.head: Check your inbox for a validation link
next.components.auth.SignupComplete.inst: An email containing your account activation link is being sent to the address shown below. Check your inbox to complete your registration.
next.components.auth.SignupComplete.rese: Could not resend the email. Please try again.
The activation email has been resent.
next.components.auth.SignupComplete.step: Double-check the spelling of the email address above.
